_note: Shape mirrors items returned by https://www.cisa.gov/cybersecurity-advisories/ics-advisories. Synthetic content tuned for the seeded supplier set.

advisories.title: Honeywell Experion PKS — Stack-Based Buffer Overflow
advisories.summary: Successful exploitation could result in remote code execution on engineering workstations and unauthenticated control of process variables.

advisories.title: Collins ARINC 615A Data Loader — Insecure Firmware Update
advisories.summary: Missing cryptographic signature verification permits insertion of unsigned LSAP firmware into avionics line-replaceable units during ground maintenance.

advisories.title: Moog Servo Drive Family — Improper Authentication
advisories.summary: Authentication bypass in the configuration web service allows attackers on the OT network to alter drive parameters affecting hydraulic actuator behavior.

advisories.title: Safran Landing Systems — Maintenance Tool Privilege Escalation
advisories.summary: Local privilege escalation in maintenance laptop tooling could allow modification of brake-by-wire calibration data.
